repo.description: Restore safety in fine-tuned language models through task arithmetic

terms.context_snippet: Aligned language models face a significant limitation as their fine-tuning often results in compromised safety. To tackle this, we propose a simple method RESTA that performs LLM safety realignment. RESTA stands for **RE**storing **S**afety through **T**ask **A**rithmetic. At it…
